meta.title: Artistic Gymnastics Club Management Software in Colombia | Zaltyko - FCG
meta.description: Manage your federated artistic gymnastics club with Zaltyko. Full control over FCG athletes, official categories, levels, Copa Colombia and licenses.

hero.headline: Manage your federated artistic gymnastics club with ease
hero.subheadline: Full control over FCG-Mindeporte athletes, official categories, competition levels, Copa Colombia, selectivos and licenses.

painPoints.generic: Managing federations and licenses on paper or Excel takes hours you could spend training. Information gets lost between offices.
painPoints.specific: Renewing FCG licenses, managing selectivos for Nacional Absoluto, tracking numerical levels by category, coordination with Mindeporte.
